env.HIBENCH_HERMES_CONFIG:
model:
  provider: hibench
  default: gpt-5
providers:
  hibench:
    name: HiBench Recorder
    api: {base_url}
    api_key: hibench-dummy-key
    transport: chat_completions
    default_model: gpt-5
    context_length: 200000
    discover_models: false
    models:
      gpt-5:
        context_length: 200000
model_catalog:
  enabled: false

capture.notes: The runner writes a clean Hermes config.yaml with a local OpenAI-compatible recorder provider and returns a synthetic chat completion after capturing request payloads.
